memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_SetRegister

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function send a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value, u8 Mask)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_ModifyRegister

briefdescription.para: This function modifies a single byte to the TI LMK03318.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, int FIn, int FOut, u8 FreeRun)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_SetClock

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u8 InPortID, u8 OutPortID)
memberdef.name: TI_LMK03318_EnableBypass

briefdescription.para: This function configures the TI LMK03318 to route the specified input port to the specified output port bypassing the PLL.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
specifies the input port. Valid values are 0 to 1.
specifies the output port. Valid values are 4 to 7.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the TI LMK03318 with default values for use with the Video FMC.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function puts the TI LMK03318 into sleep.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.

briefdescription.para: This function displays a registerdump of the TI LMK03318 device.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
